A.description: Event A: Observe an even number when tossing a fair die. The answer uses its constituent outcomes to compute P(A) = P(2) + P(4) + P(6) = 1/2 and P(A ∩ B).

B.description: Event B: Observe a number less than or equal to 4 when tossing a fair die. The answer uses its constituent outcomes to compute P(B) = P(1) + P(2) + P(3) + P(4) = 2/3 and P(A ∩ B).
